name: Create Artifactory repositories for GitHub Actions builds
name_cn: 为 GitHub Actions 构建创建 Artifactory 仓库

name: Configure JFrog CLI in GitHub Actions workflow
name_cn: 在 GitHub Actions Workflow 中配置 JFrog CLI
hint: Add the setup-jfrog-cli action to your workflow: uses: jfrog/setup-jfrog-cli@v4, configure JFROG_URL and JFROG_ACCESS_TOKEN secrets
hint_cn: 在 workflow 中添加 jfrog/setup-jfrog-cli@v4，配置 JFROG_URL 和 JFROG_ACCESS_TOKEN secrets

name: Run a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes to Artifactory
name_cn: 运行 GitHub Actions Workflow，构建并发布制品到 Artifactory
hint: Fork the sample project, add your secrets, trigger the workflow, and verify artifacts appear in Artifactory
hint_cn: Fork 示例项目，添加 secrets，触发 workflow，在 Artifactory 中确认制品已上传

name: Publish Build Info from GitHub Actions to Artifactory
name_cn: 从 GitHub Actions 发布 Build Info 到 Artifactory
hint: Add jf rt build-publish step to the workflow and verify Build Info appears in Artifactory UI
hint_cn: 在 workflow 中添加 jf rt build-publish 步骤，在 Artifactory UI 中验证 Build Info

name: Trigger Xray scan on the GitHub Actions build
name_cn: 对 GitHub Actions 构建触发 Xray 扫描
hint: Add jf rt build-scan to the workflow and verify scan results in Artifactory → Builds
hint_cn: 在 workflow 中添加 jf rt build-scan 步骤，在 Artifactory → Builds 中查看扫描结果
